_doc: Uber boss arenas + Uber-key farm sources. Markers are tagged type='uber' (controls icon/layer toggle) with a per-marker typeLabel override so the modal header reads BOSS for arenas and UBER FARM for material sources. Boss-arena rows include boss_name (the actual boss inside) and drops (Uber Unique pool / Mythic pool — verified May 2026). Drop pools are also exposed via postMessage to the trade-core iframe parent so the Items tab can populate.

markers.name: Tree of Whispers
markers.desc: Whisper Caches reward Malignant Heart, Trembling Hand, Blackened Femur, Gurgling Head — Echo of Varshan summoning materials.

markers.name: Pit Entrance — Cerrigar
markers.desc: Use Stygian Stones to enter The Pit. Distilled Fear and Sigils drop from Pit clears.

markers.name: Iron Wolves Camp
markers.desc: Iron Wolves vendor sells Stygian Stones for Honor. Helltide objectives + bounty boards earn Honor here.

markers.name: Hanged Man's Hall
markers.desc: Andariel summon arena. Use 2× Sandscorched Shackles + 2× Pincushioned Doll to summon Andariel here.

markers.name: Gaping Crevasse
markers.desc: Duriel summon arena. Use 2× Mucus-Slick Egg + 2× Shard of Agony to summon Duriel here.

markers.name: Hall of the Penitent
markers.desc: Grigoire, the Galvanic Saint summon arena. Use Living Steel to charge the altar here.

markers.name: Darkened Way
markers.desc: Lord Zir summon arena. Use Exquisite Blood to charge the altar here.

markers.name: Glacial Fissure
markers.desc: Beast in the Ice summon arena. Use Distilled Fear + Sigil of the Beast to charge the altar here.
